name: Ozoralizumab
notes: Layout TNF30–(G4S)9–ALB8–(G4S)9–TNF30 (reviews: PMC11055793; PMID 38681878). Thera export: heavy col1 = anti-TNFα VHH; heavy col2 = ALB8 through 115 aa (missing C-terminal TS vs full domain). vhh3 = full ALB8 anti-HSA 117 aa from PDB 8Z8V chain B (PMID 39083975; crystal His6 tag excluded). Second anti-TNFα arm may match col1 if TNF30 is duplicated. Cross-check WHO INN / JP SmPC / US8703131 SEQ IDs.
sources: TheraSAbDab_SeqStruc_OnlineDownload.xlsx; PDB 8Z8V chain B (ALB8 VHH) PMID 39083975
ada_display: 29.2% (with MTX, OHZORA trial); 44.3% (without MTX, NATSUZORA trial)
